heroEyebrow: Licensed land surveyors & built-environment specialists · Nairobi, Kenya
heroLead: GeoSpark Onestop Solution is an integrated practice spanning land survey, construction, urban planning, interior design, landscaping and real-estate management, from precision geospatial data to finished, sustainable spaces.
missionText: To shape Kenya's future with sustainable, innovative solutions in infrastructure, spaces and communities.
visionText: To be Kenya's leading partner in building smart, green and resilient spaces.

processSteps.title: Scope & site visit
processSteps.description: We listen, walk the site and define deliverables, timeline and cost, with no obligation.

processSteps.title: Survey & analysis
processSteps.description: RTK GNSS, drone capture and GIS analysis establish the ground truth everything else builds on.

processSteps.title: Design & build
processSteps.description: Plans, approvals and construction run under one accountable team with weekly reporting.

processSteps.title: Handover & care
processSteps.description: Documentation, titles and ongoing management or maintenance where you need it.

journey.label: FOUNDED
journey.title: Two surveyors, one banker
journey.description: GeoSpark Onestop Solution is registered in Nairobi with a field-first survey practice.

journey.label: EXPANSION
journey.title: Six service lines
journey.description: Construction, planning, interiors, landscaping and property management join the survey core.

journey.label: TODAY
journey.title: Drone & GIS at scale
journey.description: UAV mapping, RTK GNSS and GIS analysis serving counties, developers and landowners.

aboutStory1: GeoSpark began in the field: two surveying graduates of the Technical University of Kenya watching projects stall between the surveyor, the planner, the contractor and the financier. The answer was a single accountable practice.
aboutStory2: Today GeoSpark spans land survey and geospatial services, construction, urban planning, interior design, landscaping and real-estate management, with one team from the first coordinate to the finished, sustainable space.
ctaSubcopy: From a single boundary survey to a full development, tell us about your project and we'll respond within one working day.
footerBlurb: Licensed land surveyors and built-environment specialists. Turning ground truth into buildable, bankable, titled land across Kenya.
